leadText: Avocado (Japanese: アボカド Avocado) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V An ingredient with sweet notes—though its flavor is very mild. The avocado's richness, however, makes it satisfying to eat.

sections.title: In the core series games
